scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.start: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm start --prefix server" "npm run start --prefix client"
scripts.check: npm run build --prefix client && node --check server/src/app.js
